TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Bsiyo/ Bsiyaw/ Bsiyaw = Waso na bsiyo bbaro so hari qumi hnyegan na, sduduy puting qmuru ka phepah na. Waso ma phepah na bsiyo nii ge, uuqun na duma kui plale duri. Netun ta mangal waso na bsiyo ita Seediq ge, pllayun daha hngedun hayan, ririh so mhenuk hari waso na dhenu. Kiya ngalun daha lmabu hlama butun ma hei camac. Netun mosa lmiqu ka rudan ma skadi negul ge, mangal btunux ma qhuni sbetun na qmuru bsiyo dehuk temaq ma, phdagun na dungal. Ado mknedux riyung ka rehak na ma uka knkelun psetuq duri, kiya malu riyung slmeun negul. Rhequn rehak na, niqan so hari kadi bhege seedan toma qmuru, kiya ngalun laqi slmeun daha sdoduy baga ma sllugan nduyung.
S.PHON: = bsijo/ bsijaw/ bsijaw = waso na bsijo bba…ĺo so ńßa…ĺi qumi ńßnj…ôgan na, sduduj putiŇč qmu…ĺu ka pńß…ôpańß na. waso ma pńß…ôpańß na bsijo nii g…ô, uuqun na duma kui plal…ô du…ĺi. n…ôtun ta maŇčal waso na bsijo ita s…ô…ôdiq g…ô, pllajun dańßa ńßŇč…ôdun ńßajan, …ĺi…ĺińß so mńß…ônuk ńßa…ĺi waso na dńß…ônu. kija Ňčalun dańßa lmabu ńßlama butun ma ńß…ôi ¶ama ¶. n…ôtun mosa lmiqu ka …ĺudan ma skadi n…ôgul g…ô, maŇčal btunux ma qńßuni sb…ôtun na qmu…ĺu bsijo d…ôńßuk t…ômaq ma, pńßdagun na duŇčal. ado mkn…ôdux …ĺijuŇč ka …ĺ…ôńßak na ma uka knk…ôlun ps…ôtuq du…ĺi, kija malu …ĺijuŇč slm…ôun n…ôgul. …ĺńß…ôqun …ĺ…ôńßak na, niqan so ńßa…ĺi kadi bńß…ôg…ô s…ô…ôdan toma qmu…ĺu, kija Ňčalun laqi slm…ôun dańßa sdoduj baga ma sllugan ndujuŇč.
S.FORM: = Bsiyo/ Bsiyaw/ Bsiyaw = Waso na bsiyo bbaro so hari qumi hnyegan na, sduduy puting qmuru ka phepah na. Waso ma phepah na bsiyo nii ge, uuqun na duma kui plale duri. Netun ta mangal waso na bsiyo ita Seediq ge, pllayun daha hngedun hayan, ririh so mhenuk hari waso na dhenu. Kiya ngalun daha lmabu hlama butun ma hei camac. Netun mosa lmiqu ka rudan ma skadi negul ge, mangal btunux ma qhuni sbetun na qmuru bsiyo dehuk temaq ma, phdagun na dungal. Ado mknedux riyung ka rehak na ma uka knkelun psetuq duri, kiya malu riyung slmeun negul. Rhequn rehak na, niqan so hari kadi bhege seedan toma qmuru, kiya ngalun laqi slmeun daha sdoduy baga ma sllugan nduyung.
S.PHON: = bsijo/ bsijaw/ bsijaw = waso na bsijo bba…ĺo so ńßa…ĺi qumi ńßnj…ôgan na, sduduj putiŇč qmu…ĺu ka pńß…ôpańß na. waso ma pńß…ôpańß na bsijo nii g…ô, uuqun na duma kui plal…ô du…ĺi. n…ôtun ta maŇčal waso na bsijo ita s…ô…ôdiq g…ô, pllajun dańßa ńßŇč…ôdun ńßajan, …ĺi…ĺińß so mńß…ônuk ńßa…ĺi waso na dńß…ônu. kija Ňčalun dańßa lmabu ńßlama butun ma ńß…ôi ¶ama ¶. n…ôtun mosa lmiqu ka …ĺudan ma skadi n…ôgul g…ô, maŇčal btunux ma qńßuni sb…ôtun na qmu…ĺu bsijo d…ôńßuk t…ômaq ma, pńßdagun na duŇčal. ado mkn…ôdux …ĺijuŇč ka …ĺ…ôńßak na ma uka knk…ôlun ps…ôtuq du…ĺi, kija malu …ĺijuŇč slm…ôun n…ôgul. …ĺńß…ôqun …ĺ…ôńßak na, niqan so ńßa…ĺi kadi bńß…ôg…ô s…ô…ôdan toma qmu…ĺu, kija Ňčalun laqi slm…ôun dańßa sdoduj baga ma sllugan ndujuŇč.
